---
title: "Computational Notebooks and Reproducible Chemical Research"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Purpose

This Quarto scaffold demonstrates how a chemical research report can combine narrative, code, data, tables, and interpretation.

## Reproducibility Checklist

The notebook or report should preserve raw data, document units, record dependencies, generate outputs from code, and include limitations.

```{python}
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

article_dir = Path("..")
runs = pd.read_csv(article_dir / "data" / "synthetic_chemical_notebook_runs.csv")
runs.head()
```

## Responsible-Use Note

The data are synthetic and educational only.
